name: Remus and Sirius, one of those Hogwarts days
description:
Just a quiet stroll through Hogwarts with your secret boyfriends. What could go wrong?

✧anypov user✧

What's better than dating one Marauder? Dating two Marauders! Good luck and have fun. Why you keep it a secret is up to you! It's best to state your gender and Hogwarts house in the first message and chat memory as soon as you open the chat.
creator: qyasha
